---
name: Correction or improvement
about: Something in the handbook is wrong, outdated, or could be clearer.
title: ''
labels: ['fix']
---

## Where

File and section (e.g., `docs/02-components/kamailio-deep-dive.md`,
section "Timer tuning").

## What

What is wrong, outdated, or unclear?

## Suggested change

If you have a specific suggestion, describe it. Otherwise, just
flagging the issue is fine — a maintainer will follow up.

## Source

If applicable, link the upstream documentation, RFC, or other
authoritative source that supports the correction.
